zh.lifeSummary: 當Méen II "The Proud" de Fougères, Baron of Fougères於大約1015年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯時，他的父親Auffroy Alfred de Fougères36歲，母親Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy21歲。他和Adélaïde De Sablé至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1092年在法國諾門迪曼其隆維爾享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Méen II "The Proud" de Fougères, Baron of Fougères于大约1015年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯时，他的父亲Auffroy Alfred de Fougères36岁，母亲Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy21岁。他和Adélaïde De Sablé至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1092年在法国諾門迪曼其隆維爾享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fougères,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Alcide, Armand, Emile, Fleurette, Thierry.

French (Fougère): topographic name for someone who lived in a place densely grown with ferns, from Old French foug(i)ere ‘fern, bracken’ (from Late Latin filicaria); or a habitational name from (La) Fougère, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Fugere .

History: Jean Fougère from Poupry in Eure-et-Loir, France, married first Marie Bourg in Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada) in 1713, and second Marie-Madeleine Belliveau in Port-Toulouse (St. Peters), NS, Canada, c. 1728.

variants.name: Fugere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Celine, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Normand, Philippe, Pierre, Sylvian.
French (Fugère): variant of Fougère (see Fougere ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Méen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘fish; Pisces’; name of the daughter of the goddess of the dawn, and of the wife of the ancient sage Kasyapa. Often a short form of Meenakshi (‘having eyes shaped like a fish’), the name of a princess of Madurai, now its patron goddess and commonly identified with Durga, the wife of Shiva.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  ♂ ‘Profit’ or ‘sharp’.
2  ♀, ♂ ‘Upright’.

nameMeanings.name: "The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a variant spelling of Ty or a transferred use of the surname, a local name for someone who lived by a common pasture, Middle English tye.

nameMeanings.name: Proud"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): nickname for a vain or haughtyman, from Middle English prod, prud ‘proud’ (late OldEnglish prūd, from the oblique form of Old Frenchproz).

variants.name: Proudman
meanings: English (northwest Midlands):
nickname from Middle English proud ‘proud, haughty, arrogant’ + man. Compare Proud , Proudfoot .
(of Norman origin): nickname from Old French prud'homme ‘honest, upright man’.

variants.name: Prout
meanings: English (mainly Cornwall): variant of   Proud  .
French: variant of   Provost   ‘provost’.

variants.name: Prude
meanings: Pet form of   Gertrud  , also of   Ermentrud   and other names ending with the same element.

en.lifeSummary: When Méen II "The Proud" de Fougères, Baron of Fougères was born about 1015, in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Auffroy Alfred de Fougères, was 36 and his mother, Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy, was 21. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Adélaïde De Sablé. He died in 1092, in Longueville, Manche, Normandy, France, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Méen II "The Proud" de Fougères, Baron of Fougères est né environ 1015, à Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Auffroy Alfred de Fougères, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Adélaïde De Sablé. Il est décédé en 1092, à Longueville, Manche, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Méen II "The Proud" de Fougères, Baron of Fougères um 1015 in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Auffroy Alfred de Fougères 36 und seine Mutter Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy 21. Er hatte mit Adélaïde De Sablé mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1092 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Longueville, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich.

ja.lifeSummary: Méen II "The Proud" de Fougères, Baron of Fougèresが約1015年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインフォウグeレスで生まれた時，父Auffroy Alfred de Fougèresは36歳，母Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoyは21歳であった。彼はAdélaïde De Sabléとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1092年にフランスノーマンディマンチェロングエヴィルで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Méen II "The Proud" de Fougères, Baron of Fougères(이)가 대략 1015년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 포우그e레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Auffroy Alfred de Fougères(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Adélaïde De Sablé(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1092년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 론구에빌에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Méen II "The Proud" de Fougères, Baron of Fougères родился около 1015 г. в местности фоугeресь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Auffroy Alfred de Fougères было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy, 21. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Adélaïde De Sablé. Он умер в 1092 г. в местности лонгуевилл, манч, норманди, Франция в возрасте 78 лет.
